article_title: Update to Manufacturer terms and conditions for producing non-intoxicating beverages

briefs.title: Manufacturers Can Now Produce Non-Alcoholic Beverages Under Existing Liquor Licence
briefs.summary: BC's LCRB has updated Manufacturer Terms and Conditions to explicitly permit licensed facilities to produce, sell, and sample non-intoxicating beverages (e.g. soda, tonic, de-alcoholized drinks) alongside alcohol production.
briefs.article_title: Update to Manufacturer terms and conditions for producing non-intoxicating beverages
